business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Nationwide Insurance premium $1,634,721.63 with 13 claims and no cancellation; 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard premium $1,476,849.96 with 10 claims and no cancellation; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium $1,369,245.71 with 4 claims and cancellation noted as yes.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Years in business: 42; years with current management: 28. Employees: 425 full-time and 45 part-time. Annual revenue/gross receipts: $95,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written safety program: Yes. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits: Yes. Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations: Yes. Certificates of insurance required from all subcontractors before work begins: No. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors: No. Demolition or blasting operations: Yes. Operations above 4 stories: Yes.

concerns: Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations.
Certificates of insurance are not required from all subcontractors before work begins.
Applicant does not have written contracts with all subcontractors.
Hold-harmless agreements are not obtained from all subcontractors.
Applicant performs demolition or blasting operations.
40% of work is performed by subcontractors.
One warehouse location is not sprinklered.
Prior insurance history shows 27 claims over 2022-2024 and a cancellation in 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history lists 27 total claims over 2022-2024: 13 in 2024, 10 in 2023, and 4 in 2022. A cancellation was noted for 2022 only. No claim amounts or loss details were provided.
positives: 42 years in business and 28 years with current management.
Formal safety program and formal written safety program are in place.
Formal return-to-work or modified duty program is in place.
Applicant maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits.
Four of five listed premises are sprinklered.
Operations focus on commercial and institutional construction in Western Pennsylvania.
